examples: Rose and Galen were nearly knocked from the path when a riderless, wild-eyed horse galloped by.
Synchronised fell first time round this year but continued riderless for another five fences before fracturing his leg.
Most experts agree that an open oval such as the mile-long track at Churchill Downs would present problems for riderless horses.
Video of the annual riderless race in Ronciglione shows that horses there do make turns, although the surface is slippery and they don't seem to be running at full speed.
